hook.text: UNITED IN CONTACT FOR PSG WINGER BARCOLA

beats.text: PSG DEMAND £60M FOR THE FRENCH WINGER
ROMANO: UNITED HAVE HELD DISCUSSIONS WITH PSG
MAN CITY LEAD THE RACE BUT UNITED ARE ACTIVE
BARCOLA HIT 13 GOALS AND 7 ASSISTS LAST SEASON

caption: Fabrizio Romano reports United have held discussions with PSG over Bradley Barcola — the 24-year-old French winger is valued at £60m. Man City are leading the race but United have made club-to-club contact. 13 goals and 7 assists for PSG last season. Can Carrick prise him away from City? 🔴 REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano. Would Barcola be your signing of the summer?
